feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ILOCANALYSISCUBE_F - Could you please let us know what are the source tables associated with this an
entry.content: ILOCANALYSISCUBE_F - Could you please let us know what are the source tables associated with this and any weblink which provides these details?

entry.title: create and update sales order with API_SALES_ORDER_SRV using $batch with content-id in a changeset
entry.content:
I am trying to update the sales order schedule lines once the sales order is created using API_SALES_ORDER_SRV using $batch. 
i am getting 500 Internal server error. in SAP S4 HANA 2023. any one faced similar issue please help.

how to get the sales order number created in the first post call to do patch in the same changeset using Content-ID?. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Mass update a field in Z*table
entry.content:
Hi,
I need to mass update a field in a Z*table that has 20Millions entries.

I am using UPDATE Z*table set + COMMIT WORK while looping in an itab.

I scheduled it as background job which is taking like 6-8 hrs..

Is there any way to make this more faster?

entry.title: shopping cart in MM for SAP Help
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How are you?

I have some questions about the shopping cart in MM for SAP, I need to know and information about shopping cart and what, where, How? ..... etc, for where is using the shopping cart in SAP and how to use this in any project.

And what is the benefit for shopping cart and what is the circle or workflow for the shopping cart for any project if you have any example?

If there anyone you can explain to me and if you have any website or photo to help me pls shared with me.

Thank you,

#ERP #MM #SAP #material_management #MM #cart #s4hana #sap #help #support #workflow

entry.title: Barcode Scanning function using ABAP
entry.content:
I would like to know can we create barcode scanning action using ABAP in eclipse ADT.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Call web URL in ABAP class (eclipse ADT)
entry.content:
I want to use a web link/ URL  (example link : https://www.sap.com) inside ABAP class in eclipse .But facing issues like call methods, cl_gui_frontend_services  and other function modules are not permitted. Calling Web URL directly into ABAP  class is possible? or any alternative methods are there ? pls provide a solution to this.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment  BW SAP HANA Modeling Tools (Eclipse) 

#ECLIPSE

entry.title: RAP vs CAP (database-wise)
entry.content:
I’m seeking clarification on the pros and cons of using RAP and CAP strictly in terms of database usage. Based on my understanding, RAP utilizes the S/4HANA Cloud database within the ABAP environment, whereas CAP works with the S/4HANA Cloud database via the HANA DB Explorer.

In a recent internal discussion with SAP at our company, it was mentioned that the HANA database accessed through the HANA DB Explorer is more stable compared to the one used in the ABAP environment. This has caused some confusion, as I haven't been able to find clear information or articles to verify this.

Could you explain the difference between these databases?

Are there any advantages of one over the other?

Could you provide sample use cases where one would be preferred over the other?

Additionally, in terms of backup and restoration, is it possible to perform this for both environments?

entry.title: Financial Statements F.01 for S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I would like to get the F.01 data by Excel.

My boss told me that need to do copy and paste from the SAP Screen. Is this true?

Is there any other good way to get the excel data by SAP S/4 HANA?

Thank you so much in advance for your help.

Best regards,

entry.title: Select With Internal Table
entry.content:
hi,

I have to do a Select with an internal table in Inner Join, but I get this error:

 

This is how I build the internal table:

entry.title: What is the best practice for storing attachment files that were uploaded from RAP-Fiori application
entry.content:
Hi, I start learning SAP RAP from RAP100, RAP110
and find that in the tutorial, the attachment will be kept in the created database table as RAWSTRING

Is the way it's kept the attachment as RAWSTRING in a database table best practice?

Or can we pass the attachment binary to another content server and store only the ID that can linked with the attachment in the content server?

If we can use a content server, is there any document or tutorial to show me how to do it?

Thanks,
Pakorn

entry.title: Change BP Grouping ( Account Group ) in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

We can't change bp grouping.

We run BP transaction.

The button to change in Customer:General Data shows the message :

" Re-direct to account group change functionality".

After that we push "Enter" button and the system leave to BP transaction. So we've not to option to change the grouping.  

Pls, any solution? 

Thnks in advance.

entry.title: occurs obsolete abap
entry.content:
hi,

I need to create a table that takes a structure that I created in SE11.
I used the Occors command:

DATA: gt_test LIKE ZTEST OCCURS 1000.

what can I use instead of occurs?

thank you

entry.title: SAP Vulnerability Issue
entry.content:
We have received a recent vulnerability in SAP appearing on the CERT-in site. Below is the screenshot of the same.

Requesting you to kindly confirm if this vulnerability is applicable for SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition & share such SAP KBA/Note for references.

We have a new customer where RBI & Auditors have dropped a question which requires urgent resolution.

Currently, we are in Server Provisioning stage with the New Customer.

entry.title: SAP Encryption Key - Database - SSFS
entry.content:
Hi all,

In the command line:

rsecssfx generatekey -getPlainValueToConsole

What is the format of the key generated? (AES 256 bits)?

Can this command

rsecssfx changekey <new key>

be used with a key generated externally? with openssl or other? In this case what would be the format.

Kind regards,
ily83

entry.title: Inbound Idoc is also getting generated with outbound Idoc
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have done the configuration for Outbound Idoc for message type PROJECT and basic type PROJECT02. The outbound Idoc is getting triggerred correctly with status 03. But along with it inbound Idoc also getting triggerred with status 51. Any one knows why the inbound Idoc is getting triggerred.

Thanks,

Vidhya

entry.title: Access Control Objects
entry.content:
Hi Amigos,

I wanted to ask like in Access Control Objects, what are all clauses used?

Thank you,

kaushik

SAP Access Control for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Field for creation user is missing in source reference ZXX_GROCERY type TABL.
entry.content:
I'm trying to generate ABAP Repository Object by the instruction of "Building an ABAP RESTful Application" topic of Learning the Basics of ABAP Programming on SAP BTP provided by Learn SAP site.

But the generation of the repository object causes an error, displaying, "Field for creation user is missing in source reference ZXX_GROCERY type TABL." and "Field for change user is missing in source reference ZXX_GROCERY type TABL."

As per the solution that was given by SAP community, I modified the createdby field to abp_creation_user and lastchangedby to abp_lastchange_user, but the error still occurs. Please help.

entry.title: Add custom GUI Status AT Maintaining ztable (SM30)
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can a maintain view of a ztable can be custom to add a new (custom) gui status here.

For example: there's a select box in the table and I want to custom a select all of check boxes in SM30 here?

Best Regards,

Sutthawee

entry.title: REQUIREMENT :hide the "post on account " tab in post outgoing payments .
entry.content: REQUIREMENT :hide the "post on account " tab in post outgoing payments in public cloud .  I have tried to use adapt UI (SAP SCREEN PERSONAS ) for this requirement. But scripts option is not there for this screen. Any other solution for this requirement ?

entry.title: Use CDS custom entity as data source/association for other views
entry.content:
Hello Community!

We built a custom cds root entity which gets its data from a remote client proxy. Now we want to use this custom entity as a data source for other views or as association/join in other views. Every approach I tried failed so far - is there any solution to that?

Use custom entity as data source:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_CustomEntity

 

 Error: Entity "I_CustomEntity" cannot be used as the data source

Use custom entity in join statement:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_Entity1 join I_CustomEntity ....

 

Error: Entity "I_CustomEntity" cannot be used as the data source

Use custom entity as association:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_Entity1

  association [1] to I_CustomEntity as _Custom ...
{
  _Custom.Field1
}

 

Error: Target of association _Custom cannot be an abstract/custom entity
